name: shape_feature_pr2056
description: Test pytensor#2056 ("Rewrite ShapeFeature to not hold live variables"). Replaces the eager per-variable dict in ShapeFeature with a lazy FrozenFunctionGraph-based shape kernel cache. Eliminates stale-XRV bugs and should speed up rewrite time on models with many shaped variables (reported -30% on radon_repeat, -9% on radon_variants).
